title: The Frisco Bar & Grill
address: 6750 Gaylord Pkwy ste.120, Frisco, TX 75034, USA
description: Come join us at The Frisco Bar & Grill on Gaylord Parkway in Frisco for a Friday night of live music. This locally owned neighborhood bar has been a Frisco staple for years - WHERE OLD FRIENDS MEET AND NEW FRIENDS ARE FOUND, as they say. Southwestern comfort food, cold drinks, multiple TVs, and no cover charge. If you're in Frisco or anywhere up the North Dallas corridor, come out and find us.

title: Watters Creek Village
address: 970 Garden Park Dr, Allen, TX 75013, USA
description: Live Radio DFW joins the Concerts by the Creek series at Watters Creek Village in Allen for a free Friday evening of outdoor music. Bring a blanket or a lawn chair and stake out a spot on the Village Green - the creek-side setting at this 52-acre open-air district is one of the best outdoor concert backdrops in Collin County. Patio dining options surround the green if you want to grab a meal before the show. Free admission, no tickets, family-friendly all the way.

title: The Frisco Bar & Grill
address: 6750 Gaylord Pkwy ste.120, Frisco, TX 75034, USA
description: Catch us at The Frisco Bar & Grill on Gaylord Parkway for a summer Friday night out. A solid Friday night for Frisco and the surrounding communities.

A great way to end a summer Friday in the heart of Plano.

A great night for Carrollton, Farmers Branch, and the surrounding communities. Come join us.

title: Harvest Hall - Third Rail
address: 815 S Main St, Grapevine, TX 76051, USA
description: This venue rocks! Live Radio DFW plays the Third Rail stage inside Harvest Hall in downtown Grapevine - a listening-room-style setup that's designed so you can truly hear the band. Eight chef-driven kitchens for dinner, craft drinks at the bar, and then the show in one of DFW's best small-venue experiences. No cover charge. A late-summer Saturday done right for the Grapevine, Southlake, and mid-cities crowd.

title: Powder Creek Pavilion
address: 522 S Center St, Bonham, TX 75418, USA
description: Powder Creek Pavilion is Fannin County's premier live music venue. Family-friendly, so you can bring the whole crew to enjoy a great time in a relaxed and smoke-free environment.

title: Frisco Rail Yard
address: 9040 First St, Frisco, TX 75034, USA
description: Live Radio DFW heads to the Frisco Rail Yard in downtown Frisco's Rail District for a Saturday night show. This open-air food truck park on First Street is one of our favorite outdoor stages - rotating food trucks from local chefs, a full bar, dogs welcome, and plenty of room to find a good spot near the stage. No cover charge. Fall is a beautiful time in the Rail District, and it's all walkable. Frisco, come join us.

description: Outdoor fun - great stage, great great people. Come rock with us.

title: Lucy's Yard
address: 1070 Watters Creek Blvd, Allen, TX 75013, USA
description: Casual shareables and entrees with craft beers and custom cocktails ordered concession-style. Dog-friendly patios with large TVs plus an on-leash park and live music on the weekends.

title: Frisco Rail Yard
address: 9040 First St, Frisco, TX 75034, USA
description: Live Radio DFW takes the stage at the Frisco Rail Yard in downtown Frisco's Rail District for a Saturday evening show. First Street's open-air food truck park is a great early-spring night out - rotating food trucks, a full bar, dogs welcome, no cover charge. The Rail District is walkable and always worth exploring before and after the show. Frisco, The Colony, Allen - come rock with us at the Rail Yard.

title: Frisco Rail Yard
address: 9040 First St, Frisco, TX 75034, USA
description: We're back at the Frisco Rail Yard in downtown Frisco's Rail District for a spring Saturday evening show. The food trucks are rolling, the full bar is stocked, and the outdoor stage is one of our favorite setups in North Texas. No cover charge, dogs welcome. Come grab some food, find a spot, and enjoy the night. Frisco and the Rail District crowd - come join us.

title: Fresh by Brookshires
address: 5100 I-30, Fate, TX 75189, USA
description: Join us on the patio at FRESH by Brookshire's in Fate for a free Saturday evening of live music. The outdoor grill and patio area makes for a relaxed, family-friendly atmosphere right off I-30. Grab dinner from the patio grill, pick up a craft beer or glass of wine, and enjoy the show - no tickets needed. FRESH hosts live music every weekend on the patio, and it's become one of the go-to hangouts for the Rockwall, Heath, and Fate communities.

title: Frisco Rail Yard
address: 9040 First St, Frisco, TX 75034, USA
description: Live Radio DFW takes over the Frisco Rail Yard in Downtown Frisco's Rail District. This open-air food truck park is the perfect spot for a Saturday night out - rotating food trucks, a full bar, and plenty of room to spread out. Bring the crew (dogs welcome too) and grab a table or post up near the stage. No cover charge. The Rail District is walkable and worth exploring before and after the show.

title: Fresh by Brookshires
address: 5100 I-30, Fate, TX 75189, USA
description: We're back at FRESH by Brookshire's in Fate for another free evening of live music on the patio. Same great setup - outdoor grill, cold drinks, and a laid-back family-friendly vibe right off I-30. The patio grill serves food until 8:45 PM, and the wine and craft beer selection inside is worth browsing before you settle in. No tickets, no cover - just show up and enjoy the music.

title: Watters Creek
address: 970 Garden Park Dr, Allen, TX 75013, USA
description: Live Radio DFW joins the Concerts by the Creek series at Watters Creek Village in Allen. Bring a blanket or lawn chair and stake out a spot on the Village Green - the creek-side setting is one of the best outdoor music venues in Collin County. Restaurants surrounding the green offer patio dining if you'd rather grab a table. Free admission, family-friendly, and a great way to kick off a summer Saturday evening in North Allen.

title: Sweetwater Grill
address: 4884 TX-276, Royse City, TX 75189, USA
description: Catch Live Radio DFW on the outdoor stage at Sweetwater Grill, nestled between Royse City and Union Valley on Hwy 276. This locally owned grill and bar has one of the best back patios in the I-30 corridor - full bar, yard games, and plenty of space to enjoy a summer night of live music. The kitchen serves solid American comfort food, and the drinks are strong and affordable. No cover charge. A great night out for folks in Royse City, Rockwall, Heath, Fate, and the surrounding communities - about 30 minutes east of Dallas.

title: Test Event
address: 1616 W Hebron Pkwy #108, Carrollton, TX 75010, USA
description: Live Radio DFW takes the stage at The Maverick in Carrollton, TX for a Saturday evening of live music. We'll be playing our mix of 70s, 80s, classic rock, and oldies covers across the set. A solid night out for the Carrollton, TX crowd and the surrounding DFW Metroplex communities.

title: OG Cellars - 80s Dance Party
address: 704 Co Rd 1895, Sunset, TX 76270, USA
description: Live Radio DFW heads back to O G Cellars in Sunset, TX for a Saturday night 80s Dance Party. This boutique winery sits in the rolling hills of Northwest Wise County and pours 100% Texas wines, with an on-site pizzeria that'll be open through the show. Outdoor and indoor seating, OG wine, frozen drinks, and beer on site (no outside alcohol). Tickets are $25, and it's about an hour northwest of Fort Worth on Hwy 287 - a scenic drive out through the Hill-Country-feeling part of North Texas for fans in the DFW Metroplex, Decatur, Bowie, and Wichita Falls.

title: 3 Nations Brewing
address: 3 Nations Brewing, 1033 Vandergriff Dr, Carrollton, TX 75006, USA
description: Live Radio DFW rolls into 3 Nations Brewing in old downtown Carrollton for a free Saturday night of 70s and 80s classic rock, with a few surprises mixed in. This is exactly the kind of room we love: a craft brewery with an outdoor stage, a full kitchen on site, plenty of indoor and covered seating if the Texas weather has opinions, and enough room for the whole family (yes, dogs too). 3 Nations opened in 2015 and moved into this big downtown Carrollton spot in 2019, tucked in the shadow of an old grain mill and just off I-35. Show starts at 7:00 PM. No cover. A great night out for folks in Carrollton, Farmers Branch, Addison, Lewisville, Coppell, and anyone heading up or down the 35 corridor.

title: Fresh by Brookshires
address: 5100 I-30, Fate, TX 75189, USA
description: Live Radio DFW returns to FRESH by Brookshire's in Fate for another free Saturday evening show on the patio. Food, drinks, and great music - no tickets needed. If you haven't been to FRESH yet, it's more than a grocery store: craft beer, wine, a full patio grill, and live music every weekend. A perfect stop for the Rockwall, Heath, Fate, and Royse City crowd.

title: Private Event
address: Gatherings® at Twin Creeks, Building G 651 North Watters Road

title: Uptown Rail Brewery
address: 204 Bolivar St, Sanger TX 76266
description: Live Radio DFW heads to Uptown Rail Brewery in historic Downtown Sanger. This craft brewery has 30+ beers on tap, artisanal pizza, and a stage that puts you right in the action. About 45 minutes north of the Metroplex on I-35, it's worth the drive for the beer alone - add live music and you've got a full Saturday night. No cover charge. Weather permitting, the show moves to the outdoor stage. A fun night out for folks in Sanger, Denton, Lake Dallas, Corinth, and the I-35 corridor.
